name: foundry
description: Planning-first Pi setup/runtime CLI (Composer 2.5 exclusive in v1)

scripts.postinstall: npm run install --prefix node_modules/sqlite3 --silent 2>/dev/null || npm rebuild sqlite3 --silent 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: npm run build && TSX_TSCONFIG_PATH=tsconfig.test.json node --import tsx --test tests/*.test.ts
